title: Inttelligent
desc: A successful software engineer becomes a vigilante following the demise of his mentor in a bid to seek revenge against those responsible for the latter's death.

title: Saravanan Irukka Bayamaen
desc: Saravanan, a lackadaisical young man, stumbles into power as the local political head. Subsequently, armed with clueless confidence, he uses his new role to impress the girl of his dreams.

title: Raatchasi
desc: Lieutenant Colonel Geetha Rani implements different plans to reform an undisciplined government school. However, she faces numerous challenges in her way, including a corrupt MLA.

title: Raid
desc: Inspector Prabhakaran takes an oath to eradicate criminals. However, chaos ensues when his fiance gets killed in a crossfire.

title: Bhimaa
desc: After some mysterious instances at a temple of historical significance, a detective visits the region to investigate and find out the truth behind the incidents.

title: Parking
desc: A parking spot frays the relationship between two neighbours of different generations and world views. Soon, the two men find themselves in an escalating battle to have the space all to themselves.

title: Adanga Maru
desc: Subhash, a daredevil officer, raises his voice against injustice when he comes across a few politically influential people. However, when his family is brutally murdered, he sets out to exact revenge.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Panjumittai
desc: Appu and Kuppu are the best of friends since they were children. However, their friendship is threatened when the former suspects the latter of having an affair with his wife, Ranji.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Jeeva
desc: Jeeva, who has a natural talent in cricket, dreams of playing for the Indian cricket team. However, his love life and politics in the sports governing body become obstacles to his ambition.

title: Minnal Murali
desc: Jaison, a young tailor, gains superpowers after being struck by lightning. However, he must thwart the evil intentions of an unexpected adversary to become the superhero that his rural village needs.

title: Race Gurram
desc: In an attempt to put an end to the schemes of their enemy, two brothers join forces and stop at nothing to destroy the reign of a gangster who aspires to be a politician.

title: Kaaka Muttai
desc: Two young brothers from a Chennai slum dream of tatsing pizza, but their journey to fulfill this simple desire reveals the harsh realities of poverty and social inequality.

title: Lucky Baskhar
desc: Desperate to bring his family out of monetary woes, Bhaskar Kumar, a bank employee, enters the dangerous and murky world of financial scams.
